name: Solartron Public Company Limited
summary: Solartron Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures, distributes, sells, and installs solar-cell systems and related equipment in Thailand and internationally. The company operates through Selling and Installation of Solar-Cell Systems, Distribution Solar√Ç¬ñCell, Sale of Electricity, Hire of Work, and Other segments. It also constructs solar power plants; and produces and distributes electricity from solar energy. The company was incorporated in 1986 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
